failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
fitness_keywords AS (
    SELECT to_tsquery('english', 'fitness | workout | gym | exercise | training | health') AS query
)
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, fk.query) AS relevance
FROM profile p, fitness_keywords fk
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ fk.query
  AND p.id IN (
    -- Profiles that follow or are followed by @eusougabriela (a proxy for similarity)
    SELECT origin_profile_id 
    FROM profile_relationship 
    WHERE destination_profile_id = (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
    UNION
    SELECT destination_profile_id 
    FROM profile_relationship 
    WHERE origin_profile_id = (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
  )
  AND p.id != (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
ORDER BY relevance DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH target_profile AS (

    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
fitness_query AS (
    SELECT to_tsquery('english', 'fitness | workout | gym | exercise | training | health') AS q

    p.id AS profile_id,

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
fitness_query AS (
    SELECT to_tsquery('english', 'fitness | workout | gym | exercise | training | health') AS q
)
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, fq.q) AS relevance
FROM profile p, fitness_query fq
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ fq.q
  AND p.id IN (
    SELECT pr.origin_profile_id 
    FROM profile_relationship pr
    JOIN target_profile tp ON pr.destination_profile_id = tp.id
    UNION
    SELECT pr.destination_profile_id 
    FROM profile_relationship pr
    JOIN target_profile tp ON pr.origin_profile_id = tp.id
  )
  AND p.id <> (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
ORDER BY relevance DESC
LIMIT 10;
